violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris at door gaskets of prep table.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor debris at basement dry storage area. -Water/debris at floor of walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at side surfaces of stainless freezer (next to Coke cooler handle). -Debris/residue at lower shelf of prep table in kitchen. -Residue at bottom edges of upright storage in kithcen.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. -Single use portion cup being used as scoop in seasoning mix. *COS-Disposed of immediately. -Single use forks at pass through are not stored inverted to protect food contact surface.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Bar cold hold handle "repaired" with tape.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Handle cracked on Deli Coke cooler at bar. -Handle missing/broken off on Coke cooler in kitchen area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris at floors in dry storage and water and debris at floors of walk in cooler.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Facility has designated the top wire shelf in kitchen Coke cooler for employee items. *Employee items should be below and separate from food service items.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
